step0.title: Welcome to Kernel
step0.subtitle: Your personal AI, built for you.
step0.body: A personal AI that learns who you are, remembers what matters, and sharpens with every conversation.

step1.title: It Learns You
step1.subtitle: Memory that compounds.
step1.body: As you talk, Kernel builds a knowledge graph of your interests, goals, and relationships. Every conversation makes the next one better.

step2.title: Specialist Agents
step2.subtitle: The right mind for the job.
step2.body: Your messages are routed to specialist agents — a researcher for deep questions, a coder for technical work, a writer for creative tasks.

step3.title: What interests you?
step3.subtitle: Pick a few to help Kernel get to know you.
